title: New Galactic Empire (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Empire}}
{{Otheruses|Sith Empire}}
The terms '''New Empire''' or '''New Galactic Empire''' may refer to the following organizations:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[First Order]]''', the successor state to the [[Galactic Empire]] after the former regime fell during the [[Battle of Jakku]].
*The '''[[Final Order]]''', also known as the '''New Empire''' and the '''Sith Empire''', which was led by the reborn [[Darth Sidious]] but fell during the [[Battle of Exegol]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==

*The '''[[New Empire]]''', a Sith Empire founded by [[Darth Malgus]] to replace the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] formed by [[Tenebrae|Darth Vitiate]].
*The '''[[New Sith]]''', also known as the '''New Sith Empire''', a Sith Empire created by [[Darth Ruin/Legends|Darth Ruin]] that lasted throughout the millennium-long [[New Sith Wars]].
*The '''[[Imperial Remnant]]''' as well as various splinter factions and smaller empires created after the fracturing of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], such as the [[Dark Empire]] led by the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], the [[Restored Empire]] of [[Ennix Devian]], or [[Trioculus' Empire]].
*The '''[[New Order (Darth Caedus)|New Order]]''' of [[Darth Caedus]], which called for the reorganization of the '''[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]''' into a successor of the Galactic Empire known as the '''New Empire'''.
*The '''[[Fel Empire]]''', also known as the '''New Galactic Empire''', which was the restored and ethically reformed version of the Galactic Empire created from the Imperial Remnant, led by the [[Fel dynasty]].
*'''[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]]''', also known as the '''New Galactic Empire''' and the '''Darth Krayt's Sith Empire''', which was a revival of Darth Sidious' Galactic Empire after [[Darth Krayt]] overthrew the Fel dynasty.

==Other==

*The non-canonical '''[[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|Galactic Empire]]''', also known as the '''New Galactic Empire''', a dictatorship featured in ''[[The Star Wars]]''.
*'''[[Galactic Empire (Am and Karre)|Am and Karre's Galactic Empire]]''', also known as the  '''T-Empire''', an Imperial faction which emerged following the Battle of Exegol that appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]'' episode "[[THE TWINS]]".
*In the Original draft for The Force Awakens, the first order was to be called The Neo-Empire
